description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in WebAPP before 0.9.9.5 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via unspecified vectors related to (1) Gallery Comments pages, (2) Feedback pages, (3) Search Results pages, and (4) the Statistics Log viewer.
